ddls:
CREATE TABLE "volatility_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the volatility measurement */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility metric for the given date */,
  "same_month_status" TEXT /* Status of the same month in the previous year (Normal/Anomaly) */,
  "last_month_status" TEXT /* Status of the previous month (Normal/Anomaly) */,
  "last_year_status" TEXT /* Status of the same month in the previous year (Normal/Anomaly) */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume for the given date */,
  "price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument for the given date */,
  "anomaly_detected" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if an anomaly was detected */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly detected (e.g., Volatility, Volume) */,
  "anomaly_message" TEXT /* Message describing the anomaly detected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the financial instrument (e.g., Stock, Bond) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or ticker for the financial instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Name of the issuer of the financial instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector the instrument belongs to */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market or exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is denominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_definitions" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly definition */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly (e.g., Volatility, Volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for detecting an anomaly */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly definition */,
  "alert_message_template" TEXT /* Template for generating alert messages when an anomaly is detected */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the anomaly (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly log */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the anomaly was detected */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anomaly definition */,
  "anomaly_value" REAL /* Value of the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly (e.g., Volatility, Volume) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the detected anomaly */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Generated alert message based on the template and actual data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomaly_logs_anomaly_id FOREIGN KEY ("anomaly_id") REFERENCES anomaly_definitions ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomaly_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., Volatility, Volume) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume for the historical data */,
  "price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument for the historical data */,
  "anomaly_detected" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if an anomaly was detected in the historical data */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly detected in the historical data (e.g., Volatility, Volume) */,
  "anomaly_message" TEXT /* Message describing the anomaly detected in the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "instrument_id", "metric")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource being accessed (e.g., volatility_data, anomaly_logs) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, monthly, yearly) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access log */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high volatility, high volume) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Email or phone number to which the alert was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., sent, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)
